general_news.title: That was then, that was then
general_news.summary: Fred Anderson has demonstrated how a futuristic novel written in 1763 can help to shed light on British thinking about the long-term consequences of the peace [from the Seven Years’ War]. The anonymously published The Reign of George VI, 1900-1925 presents a scenario far in the future, in the early twentieth century. The book’s counterhistorical […] The post That was then, that was then appeared first on Marginal REVOLUTION.
